header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- The Pharma World -- Industry Vocabulary (Present Simple)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 8 -- The Pharma World

listenings.text: Hi, I am Carlos, and I work in the pharma world. My company develops new medicines for patients every day. First, a product starts in the laboratory. Then our team supplies thousands of pharmacies across the country. When we launch a new treatment, doctors and patients wait for it. Our brand is strong because people trust it. The market changes fast, but one thing never changes: a patient always needs good treatment. That is why I love this industry.

Hello, my name is Renata, and I work for a big pharma brand. Our company sells medicines to pharmacies in every region. Each morning, my team studies the market and listens to doctors. A patient needs the right treatment at the right time, so we supply our products fast. When the company launches a new medicine, we explain it to every pharmacy. I love this work because our product helps real people. In the pharma world, the patient always comes first.

extra_audio.text: First, the company develops a new product in the laboratory. Then it tests the treatment for many months. After that, it launches the product on the market. Next, the team supplies the medicine to pharmacies. Finally, the patient gets the treatment and feels better.
